servinfo.title: Operation Table of A/T Component
servinfo.ptxt: : ON only when TCC is operating

servinfosub.title: Operation Table of Shift Solenoid Valves, Timing Solenoid Valve and TCC Solenoid Valve

entry.ptxt: When vehicle is travelling forwards in less than 9 km/h (6 mile/h)
When vehicle is travelling forwards in 9 km/h (6 mile/h) or more
Timing solenoid is turned ON for approx. 0.5 sec. on gear shifting
Timing solenoid is turned ON for approx. 0.5 sec. on gear shifting

servinfosub.ptxt: : ON only when TCC is operating
